Let's Talk!
Granular Marketing Programs

Events & Experiences

Booth design, event campaigns, and engagement programs that create buzz before, during, and after your event.

Book a strategy session

An event is a campaign with a deadline that doesn't move. We treat every event as a complete arc — pre-event awareness, on-site experience, and post-event follow-through — not a booth and a stack of business cards. This is also where our production scale shows most clearly: we've built full user conferences, not just exhibitor presence.

What this looks like

Event Marketing Package (Pre / During / Post)

A complete set of assets built around a single event participation: a landing page, social posts across all three phases, supporting collateral, and event emails — produced as a campaign, not one-off assets.

Trade Show / Event Booth System

A full booth presence system: hero messaging, a visual composition system that scales across booth formats and sizes, standee and banner designs, and tabletop display direction.

Event-in-a-Box

A self-contained design kit for a specific event — booth banner, printed handout, branded materials, and a social kit for pre/during/post posting — standardizing event presence across multiple conferences.

Meeting-Booking Outreach

Pre-event outbound built around securing meetings with attendees — pairing a contact list with a HubSpot scheduling page so event presence converts into real conversations.

Proof point

We organized the 2024 Ellucian LAC User Conference in Cartagena — a bold, immersive event blending the city's cultural richness with Ellucian's vision for higher education across Latin America. We also support clients at FETC, EDUCAUSE, and other major industry events.

Part of Granular Marketing Programs

Make your next event more than a booth.
